title: voodoo totem
description: replace basic minecraft totem of undying with voodoo doll
body:
This resoursepack allows you to **rename** the totem of undying to **"voodoo"** to replace its model with a beautiful voodoo doll.

![voodoo doll](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b1e4d4035edfd7a320fde84ad63eb885af78d72.png) _(its look better in game >.<, so see the gallery)_

I also **strongly recommend** installing the **"RP renames"** mod, it greatly simplifies the use of my resource pack
